title: Helianthopsis viridior
taxonomy: Helianthopsis viridior is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the genus Helianthopsis which is a part of the larger family Gentianaceae. The Gentianaceae family consists of approximately 1,600 species of flowering plants. Helianthopsis viridior is a relatively understudied species within this family.
